scripts.dev: concurrently -n core,cli,dashboard,engine -c cyan,magenta,green,yellow "pnpm -C packages/core dev" "pnpm -C packages/cli dev" "pnpm -C packages/dashboard dev" "node --watch packages/cli/dist/index.js run"
scripts.clear: rm -f ~/.byne/pipeline.sqlite ~/.byne/pipeline.sqlite-wal ~/.byne/pipeline.sqlite-shm ~/.byne/resume.json && touch packages/cli/dist/index.js 2>/dev/null && echo '✓ Cleared local DB and bounced engine. Refresh the dashboard to see empty Past runs.'
